items.name_en: Ice Grey 🎉Prada New Nylon Hobo Handbag/Gold Hardware Shoulder Bag 😘😘The hobo that went viral among internet influencers is back with a new design! 👏👏This Hobo bag is amazing 👍👍Multi-functional 😘😘Waist bag/Crossbody/Shoulder bag 👍👍Handles replaced with chains, adding a touch of sexiness as a shoulder bag, comes with a long strap, love that the strap has a small charm (mini bag), can also hang other bags or pants as accessories 🙊🙊Fits all outfits 😘😘Girls, grab one now, it's so beautiful 🙊🙊Model: 1BH204, Size: L22xH12xW6cm

New Arrival 🎉Bonnie🎉1BG628🎉🎉
This retro leather bag embodies a refined yet modern personality. The geometric silhouette features modern metal buckles and side laces. The long handle reflects a practical and casual attitude. Equipped with a detachable long shoulder strap for versatile styling, it offers ample capacity. Super practical 👍👍 A must-have for fashionistas. Get this retro tote home now 🎉🎉
32x17.5x10.5cm🎉🎉🎉
